meta.notes: Consensus figures from GTA Wiki, gtabase, gtaboom, crimenetgazette, r/gtaonline. Values drift with patches and bonus weeks. The skill `gta-online-expert` holds the prose playbooks; this file is the machine-readable layer.

resets.note: weeklyUtcDay 4 = Thursday (0=Sunday). Daily collectibles reset 06:00 UTC; weekly event resets Thursday 07:00 UTC.

methods.name: Cayo Perico Heist
methods.notes: Best solo earner. Primary targets normal/hard: Tequila 630k/693k, Necklace 700k/770k, Bonds 770k/847k, Pink Diamond 1.3M/1.43M, Panther 1.9M/2.09M. Secondary: gold best (~330k/stack).
tips: Scope once (persists), then run repeatedly by re-paying the 100k setup.
Prioritize gold for secondary loot ($/bag).
72h timer affects target rotation, not your ability to run back-to-back.
Elite Challenge +200k (full loot, <15 min, no failed hacks).

methods.name: Diamond Casino Heist
methods.notes: Finale needs 2 players. Vault normal/hard: Cash 2.115M/2.33M, Art 2.35M/2.59M, Gold 2.585M/2.84M, Diamonds 3.29M/3.62M (diamonds only on special weeks). ~700-900k each per player.
tips: Big Con is the easiest reliable approach.
Do Signal Jammers first to unlock Avi (free hacker).
Can't repeat the same approach back-to-back.

methods.name: Agency - Dr. Dre VIP Contract
methods.notes: $1M finale, repeatable. Full questline first time ~1.6M.
tips: Repeatable for $1M each.
Pairs with the security/payphone loop during downtime.

methods.name: Agency - Security Contracts + Payphone Hits loop
methods.notes: Security contracts 31-70k each, back-to-back. Payphone hits 45k (with bonus method), ~10 min, unlock after 3 contracts. Best Cayo-cooldown filler.
tips: No sell vehicle, no cooldown.
Do payphone hits between security contracts.

methods.name: Cluckin' Bell Farm Raid
methods.notes: Free, no property. $500k leader + $250k first time + register/safe cash. 60-min cooldown.
tips: Best free earner for new/mid players.
Grab register and safe cash during the finale.

methods.name: Auto Shop Robbery Contracts
methods.notes: Union Depository is the highest (~300-375k). Staff take 10%.
tips: Union Depository is the best contract.
Customer cars add small passive change.

methods.name: Salvage Yard Robberies
methods.notes: 3 robberies per weekly reset (Gangbanger ~260k to Podium ~405k) + 50k bonus = ~900k-1M/week. Tow truck ~30-40k/car. Wall safe ~24k/in-game day.
tips: Capped at 3 robberies/week.
Podium robbery is the most valuable.

methods.name: CEO Vehicle Cargo (top-range) + CEO work
methods.notes: Export top-range only (~100k/car). Fill the ~20-min source cooldown with CEO work (Headhunter/Sightseer). Combined ~430k/hr.
tips: Keep 10 standard + 10 mid + 12 top-range in the warehouse to bias top-range spawns.

methods.name: Bail Office / Bounties
methods.notes: Standard bounties 35-40k (alive; -75% if target dies). Most Wanted 120k+ once/day. Agents passive 5-10k each/in-game day.
tips: Capture targets alive.
Do the daily Most Wanted ($120k).

businesses.name: Acid Lab
businesses.notes: Best solo passive. Sell from anywhere in one vehicle. Get the $250k equipment upgrade. Stack its Chemical Boost with the mansion boost.

businesses.name: Nightclub Warehouse
businesses.notes: Accrues passively from owned businesses via 5 technicians (best: Coke/Meth/Cash). 360 units ~1.93M (~1.74M after Tony's 10%). Sell in 1 vehicle. NOT mansion-boost eligible.

businesses.name: Nightclub Popularity Safe
businesses.notes: Up to $50k/in-game day, caps at $250k (~4h). Keep popularity at 100% via promos. Walk-in cash, empty before cap.

businesses.name: Bunker (Gunrunning)
businesses.notes: Set to Manufacturing (not Research). Sell before stock exceeds ~175k value or solo sells spawn multiple/aircraft vehicles. Feeds Nightclub Sporting Goods.

businesses.name: Cocaine Lockup
businesses.notes: Best MC business. Only must-buy MC. Sells in 1 van or feed the nightclub.

businesses.name: Meth Lab
businesses.notes: Good MC business, especially on bonus weeks. Feeds Nightclub Pharmaceutical Research.

businesses.name: Counterfeit Cash Factory
businesses.notes: +35% sales with Hands On Car Wash (Money Fronts). Boosted ~55k/hr. Feeds Nightclub Cash Creation.

businesses.name: Weed Farm
businesses.notes: Weak unless boosted +35% by Smoke on the Water (Money Fronts). Otherwise just a nightclub feeder.

businesses.name: Document Forgery Office
businesses.notes: Worst ROI. Skip for active sells; only a nightclub feeder if you own it.

collectibles.name: Signal Jammers
collectibles.notes: Unlocks Avi Schwartzman (free Casino Heist hacker). Do before the Casino Heist.

recurring.name: Daily Objectives
recurring.notes: All 3/day = 30k. Keep the streak for the bonuses.

recurring.name: Casino Lucky Wheel
recurring.notes: 1 free daily spin; 1/20 chance at the podium vehicle (~1M). Needs a Penthouse for the free spin.

recurring.name: Stash Houses
recurring.notes: 1/day. Free MC resupply (~75k value) if you own MC, else $30k. Weekly: 3 raids = +100k.

recurring.name: Street Dealers
recurring.notes: Sell MC/Acid product at a daily premium with no delivery mission.

recurring.name: LS Car Meet Prize Ride
recurring.notes: Free ~$1M car for the weekly challenge.

mansion.name: Prix Luxury Real Estate Mansions
mansion.update: A Safehouse in the Hills (Title Update 1.72, Dec 10 2025)
mansion.notes: Makes no income of its own. Value is the once-daily 24h +66% production boost (rotate businesses, not the nightclub), the Master Control Terminal (remote management), and one-time mission payouts. Buy AFTER you own the boosted businesses. Launch discount/$1M bonus expired.
